title: androrchis spitzelii
intro: Androrchis spitzelii, also known as Spitzel's orchid or Spitzel's Anemone Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and its potential to stimulate blood circulation. The health benefits of Androrchis spitzelii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. Androrchis spitzelii has been traditionally prepared as a tincture or decoction for its medicinal uses, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
